Eligibility & Age Limits: Eligible ages typically 18–60 (varies by base plan); Rider ceases at 70 yrs.
Applicable Base Policies: Allowed only under plans which permit AB Rider (as per base policy).
Rider Sum Assured Limits: Min SA: typically ₹10,000; Max SA: ₹1 lakh–₹5 lakh depending on base plan.
Premium Basis & Modes: Premium payable along with base policy; same mode as base policy.
Benefit Description: Provides additional lump-sum on death due to accident; no disability cover.
Waiting / Survival Periods: Generally no waiting period; accidental death must occur within prescribed window.
Exclusions: Suicide, self-injury, intoxication, war, aviation risks except as passenger, criminal acts.
Limitations & Conditions: Rider only pays on accidental death; disability not covered; must be in-force at accident.
Paid-up Rules: No paid-up value; rider ceases if base policy lapses.
Revival Rules: Revival only along with base policy revival.
Multiple Rider Attachment Allowed?: Yes, subject to base plan rules.
Interaction with Base Policy: Accident Benefit Sum Assured paid in addition to base policy death benefit.
Termination Rules: Ends at death, expiry, base-policy lapse, or rider cancellation.
